reasoning: The staff_magic_v00 asset is locatable — the white rectangular backing provides strong contrast against the dark teal grid tiles and the pink/magenta flower head is visible at a glance. However, the white panel container is visually indistinguishable from the game's own UI tooltip/label boxes (e.g., '黏黏球', '先熟悉移动与攻击' labels) that also appear as white-backed rectangles floating in-scene. A player is likely to read it as UI rather than a game object/item. The flat white backing also reads as pasted rather than native pixel-art: the surrounding entities (player, dungeon tiles, echo box) all use dark or saturated palettes with no flat white panels. The flower sprite itself has the right pixel-art fidelity, but the container undermines it. Visibility: adequate. Distinguishment from bg: good. Native integration: poor. Entity vs UI disambiguation: poor.
